case_title: GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY VS MORAN RONY J

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN RONY J
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.66 FILED BY GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN RONY J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN RONY J $520.66 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $558.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
